rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.0021 governs student discipline techniques (restraint, seclusion, time-out). The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 37.0021. USE OF CONFINEMENT, RESTRAINT, SECLUSION, AND TIME-OUT.
_note: No conflict: proposed tax exemption change has no nexus to education discipline statute.
